title: Deliciously Garlicky Croatian Polenta Pilaf
description: A traditional Croatian dish featuring garlic, olive oil, and poached vegetables, perfect for a flexitarian diet. This recipe is a nostalgic and comforting meal.
instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a large pot.
Reduce the heat to low and poach the sliced mushrooms for 5 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced onion to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, until softened.
Add the polenta to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the poached mushrooms and vegetable broth to the skillet, stirring constantly.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the polenta pilaf hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
